title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ECIL - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ECIL - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ECIL. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Jaipur-based team.

About ECIL:
ECIL is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL!
